intent: Close out the clean-break input surface migration without opening a PR, preserving raw input non-authority boundaries and avoiding unrelated dirty worktree changes.

scope.summary: Input model contract, documentation, validator, and intake-status hardening originally committed as 4117efa3bd92feb6104f17ece0499c80a816e627 and replayed onto current origin/main as 58fc1a7606686f374da1fcef4388c562b543fefb.

profile_selection_receipt.selection_rationale: Repo ingress defaults pre-1.0 work to atomic unless a hard gate requires transitional coexistence. This closeout is a single branch-isolated migration closeout with no transitional compatibility gate.
hard_gate_facts: no extension activation, publication, projection generation, or input-authority change is part of the accepted change set

leave untouched as potentially user-owned unrelated work

landing_evaluation.blocker_reason: Target cleaned closeout cannot be claimed until the source branch is pushed, hosted no-PR preflight proves route-neutral provider rules, and exact source-SHA required checks pass for the source ref.

target cleaned is intentionally fail-closed pending exact hosted evidence

not_landed_reason: Hosted no-PR landing was not yet proven at receipt creation; exact source-SHA required check evidence is mandatory before mutating origin/main.

rollback_handle.instructions: Before hosted landing, discard by deleting local and remote chore/inputs-clean-break-closeout. After any future hosted landing, revert the landed ref recorded by hosted no-PR preflight/landing evidence.
